label: iter29 Panda re-test: behavioral Glass PandaPickCube s0 (floor-raising vs collapse)
env: PROBE_ID=phasei29_behav SEEDS=0 ALGO=tdmpc-glass GLASS_LAMBDA_BEHAV=0.5 TASK=PandaPickCube MPPI_H=3 MPPI_NS=512 K_UPDATE=128 EXPL_UNTIL=25000 TOTAL_STEPS=500000 CODE_SHA=i29behav XLA_FLAGS=--xla_gpu_autotune_level=0 TMPDIR=/root/helios-rl/tmp
note: AUDIT re-test of null #2 (behavioral Glass) on Panda — killed only on clean DMC; Panda collapses (peak->final), so floor-raising has a target. Gate: worst-seed final > vanilla (n=4, 1154) AND IQM approaches jumpy (n=2, 2319) else helps-weak-baseline mirage. ~20% prior closure test.
recovery_history: requeued: rc=137 was a false-positive stale-proc kill during compile (not a real failure)

note: AUDIT re-test of null #2 (behavioral Glass) on Panda — killed only on clean DMC; Panda collapses (peak->final), so floor-raising has a target. Gate: worst-seed final > vanilla (n=4, 1154) AND IQM approaches jumpy (n=2, 2319) else helps-weak-baseline mirage. ~20% prior closure test.
